name: llm-override-troll-to-joker
description: v1.5: transcript that the rule-based scorer would route to the Troll (hype + name-drops). The synthetic LLM pick points at the Joker instead, with a rationale about variety. Asserts the override lands as primary, the rationale flows into reason, and decision.source is 'llm' every run.

input.transcript: Elon is literally a genius. Sequoia led the round and the valuation is insane — 10x what Sam Altman would've paid. Honestly, trust me, this is unprecedented. At the end of the day, nobody else has the runway to compete.

llmPick.rationale: Troll already fired twice this segment; joker finds fresh angle on the hype
